featured_projects.name: Resolvit AI
featured_projects.description: AI-powered civic issue tracking system with real-time priority scoring, blockchain audit trails, and authority performance accountability. Uses FastAPI for backend, vanilla JS/Leaflet for frontend, and PostgreSQL for storage.

featured_projects.name: Prometheus AI V2.0
featured_projects.description: A local-first, privacy-centric Gen-AI system utilizing Llama 3.2 and Apple MLX for secure, voice-enabled intelligence.

featured_projects.name: BenchAI / Student Bench AI
featured_projects.description: Offline LLM + RAG-powered smart classroom infrastructure providing multilingual AI learning support without internet dependency.

featured_projects.name: SAKRA VISION Event Hub
featured_projects.description: A next-generation AI-powered event operations platform built to replace traditional systems. Automates payment verification, email workflows, Voice AI calling, attendance tracking, and certificate distribution.

featured_projects.name: AquaSentinel AI
featured_projects.description: A specialized marine intelligence operating system tracking ocean debris, satellite telemetry (NASA MODIS, Copernicus), and local risk metrics. Features a Groq-powered AI copilot supporting regional Indian languages for mission-critical operations.

utility_projects.name: Python GUI Utility
utility_projects.description: Desktop application using Tkinter/PyQt with robust backend processing, reducing processing latency by 12% vs CLI tools.
